component.name: Wemeet
腾讯会议
component.summary: A cloud-based HD conferencing product leveraging Tencent's 20+ years of experience in audiovisual communications
腾讯20余年音视频通讯经验积累 匠心而成的云视频会议产品

description.p: This is a community package that repackages the official upstream WeMeet (Tencent Meeting) build unmodified. It is not verified by, affiliated with, or supported by Tencent, Inc.
Tencent Meeting, An Expert in Conferencing. Across any device.
Cloud meeting solutions covering 100+ countries and regions.
This package installs the official client of Tencent Meeting, Chinese version, provided by Tencent, Inc.

This build forces the app onto XWayland and restores screen sharing on Wayland sessions (e.g. wlroots/Hyprland) via an LD_PRELOAD hook. To opt out of the default device access, restrict it with: flatpak override --user --nodevice=all com.tencent.wemeet
